subtitles.original: 風真いろは 生誕ライブ 2026 行くよー！
subtitles.english: Kazama Iroha Birthday Live 2026, here we go!

subtitles.original: 「いっせーのーで」で鳴り響いた
subtitles.english: With an "un, deux, trois," resounded...

subtitles.original: スタートの合図
subtitles.english: ...the starting signal.

subtitles.original: なぞった線で結んだ世界
subtitles.english: The world bound by traced lines...

subtitles.original: 色づけていく ここから
subtitles.english: ...begins to color from here.

subtitles.original: 物心がつく頃 すでにここにあった
subtitles.english: By the time I understood, it was already here...

subtitles.original: 僕じゃない誰かの記憶は
subtitles.english: ...the memory of someone else, not me,

subtitles.original: 夕日と共に蘇る
subtitles.english: returns along with the setting sun.

subtitles.original: 古ぼけた絵本を取り出して
subtitles.english: Taking out a worn-out picture book,

subtitles.original: 落書きの中に一つの答えを見つけた
subtitles.english: I found a single answer within the scribbles.

subtitles.original: 自分の価値に目を疑って
subtitles.english: Doubting my own worth,

subtitles.original: どこまでだって落ちていけるの
subtitles.english: how far down can I possibly fall?

subtitles.original: どこか遠くに消えてしまいたい
subtitles.english: I want to disappear somewhere far away.

subtitles.original: こんな世界じゃ僕は要らない
subtitles.english: In a world like this, I'm not needed.

subtitles.original: カウントダウンは始まっているよ
subtitles.english: The countdown has already begun.

subtitles.original: 「いっせーのーで」で声を上げて
subtitles.english: With an "un, deux, trois," raise your voice,

subtitles.original: 聞こえてくるんだ
subtitles.english: and it will be heard.

subtitles.original: 自分の影 of 長さに気づく
subtitles.english: Noticing the length of my own shadow...

subtitles.original: もうこんな時間だ
subtitles.english: "It's already that time."

subtitles.original: 一等星が顔を出した
subtitles.english: The brightest star has shown its face.

subtitles.original: 届きそうで手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: Reaching out my hand as if I could grasp it.

subtitles.original: 次は僕についてきなよ
subtitles.english: "Next, follow after me,"

subtitles.original: どんな暗闇でも
subtitles.english: "no matter how deep the darkness."

subtitles.original: もういいかい？ まだだよ
subtitles.english: "Are you ready?" "Not yet."

subtitles.original: 幕は上がりだした
subtitles.english: The curtain has started to rise.

subtitles.original: もういいかい？ まだだよ
subtitles.english: "Are you ready?" "Not yet."

subtitles.original: 色づけていく ここから
subtitles.english: Coloring begins from here.

subtitles.original: 10年後の僕らは
subtitles.english: Ten years from now, we...

subtitles.original: すれ違いばかりで
subtitles.english: ...will only be passing each other by.

subtitles.original: 幻想に想いを馳せては
subtitles.english: As we lose ourselves in illusions...

subtitles.original: 「戻れない」そう思い込んだ
subtitles.english: ...convinced that "we can never go back."

subtitles.original: くたびれた心に追い打ちを
subtitles.english: Striking another blow to an already tired heart,

subtitles.original: あの頃と変わらない夕日も
subtitles.english: even the sunset, unchanged since those days,,

subtitles.original: なんとも思わない
subtitles.english: doesn't make me feel anything anymore.

subtitles.original: 自分を信じ歩いていければ
subtitles.english: If I can believe in myself and keep walking,

subtitles.original: どこまでだって登れるのにな
subtitles.english: I could have climbed to any height.

subtitles.original: カットをまたぐその空白に
subtitles.english: In the blank space spanning between cuts,

subtitles.original: 大切なもの見落としている
subtitles.english: I am overlooking what's truly important.

subtitles.original: 見つけられないと泣き喚く君へ
subtitles.english: To you, crying out because you can't find it.

subtitles.original: 「いっせーのーで」で声を上げて
subtitles.english: With an "un, deux, trois," raise your voice,

subtitles.original: 聞こえてくるんだ
subtitles.english: and it will be heard.

subtitles.original: 自分の影の長さに気づく
subtitles.english: Noticing the length of my own shadow...

subtitles.original: もうこんな時間だ
subtitles.english: "It's already that time."

subtitles.original: 一等星で駆け抜ける君
subtitles.english: You, running past like the brightest star,

subtitles.original: くっついていただけの僕でも
subtitles.english: even for someone like me who just tagged along,

subtitles.original: 君の前を走れるからな
subtitles.english: I can run ahead of you.

subtitles.original: こんな頼りない僕でも
subtitles.english: Even for someone as unreliable as me.

subtitles.original: 宝箱はホコリをかぶったまま無くした
subtitles.english: The treasure chest was lost, covered in dust.

subtitles.original: 鍵はずっと君のポケットの中にあった
subtitles.english: The key was in your pocket all along.

subtitles.original: 散らばっていた全てが今一つに重なる
subtitles.english: Everything that was scattered is now overlapping as one.

subtitles.original: 手を取り始めよう 僕たちの物語
subtitles.english: Let's take each other's hands and begin our story.

subtitles.original: 一度は要らないと思った
subtitles.english: Though I once thought I didn't need it,

subtitles.original: 今なら胸を張れる気がしたんだ
subtitles.english: I feel like I can hold my head high now.

subtitles.original: 愛おしくて
subtitles.english: So dear to me.

subtitles.original: 掛け声はいつも
subtitles.english: Our rallying cry is always...

subtitles.original: 「いっせーのーで」で声を上げて
subtitles.english: ...with an "un, deux, trois," raise your voice!

subtitles.original: 「いっせーのーで」で声を上げて
subtitles.english: With an "un, deux, trois," raise your voice,

subtitles.original: 聞こえてくるんだ
subtitles.english: and it will be heard.

subtitles.original: 自分の影の長さに気づく
subtitles.english: Noticing the length of my own shadow...

subtitles.original: もうこんな時間だ
subtitles.english: "It's already that time."

subtitles.original: 一等星が顔を出した
subtitles.english: The brightest star has shown its face.

subtitles.original: 届きそうで手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: Reaching out my hand as if I could grasp it.

subtitles.original: 次は僕についてきなよ
subtitles.english: "Next, follow after me,"

subtitles.original: どんな暗闇でも
subtitles.english: "no matter how deep the darkness."

subtitles.original: もういいかい？ まだだよ
subtitles.english: "Are you ready?" "Not yet."

subtitles.original: 泣きじゃくった声で
subtitles.english: With a sobbing voice,

subtitles.original: もういいかい？ まだだよ
subtitles.english: "Are you ready?" "Not yet."

subtitles.original: 笑う君が見えた
subtitles.english: I saw you smiling.

subtitles.original: もういいかい？ まだだよ
subtitles.english: "Are you ready?" "Not yet."

subtitles.original: 幕は上がりだした
subtitles.english: The curtain has started to rise.

subtitles.original: もういいかい？ もういいよ
subtitles.english: "Are you ready?" "Yes, I am!"

subtitles.original: 色づけていく ここから
subtitles.english: Coloring begins from here.

responses.thoughts:
**My Analysis of the Video Clip and Subtitle Generation**

Okay, so I need to generate subtitles for this video clip. Let's break this down systematically, focusing on accuracy and timing. The video's a neat 5 minutes, running from 00:00 to 05:00.  The first task is to extract the spoken content, and then the lyrics.

Right off the bat, at 00:02, Kazama Iroha says, "風真いろは 生誕ライブ 2026 行くよー！" I quickly translate it: "Kazama Iroha Birthday Live 2026, here we go!" I'll mark that down, and will use timestamp 00:02.500 -> 00:07.500.

Then, at 00:11.500, "かくれんぼ" (Hide and Seek) begins. This is where it gets interesting, matching the song lyrics, which I can read now, to the timestamps. I'll take each line, and split logical parts:

*   **00:11.600 - 00:16.800:** The first line is "「いっせーのーで」で鳴り響いたスタートの合図" which translates to "With an 'un, deux, trois,' the starting signal resounded." I'll then split it, like so:
    *   **00:11.600 - 00:14.300:** "「いっせーのーで」で鳴り響いた" translates to "With an 'un, deux, trois,' resounded..."
    *   **00:14.300 - 00:17.000:** "スタートの合図" translates to "...the starting signal."
*   **00:17.000 - 00:19.800:** Then, it goes on to "なぞった線で結んだ世界" or "The world bound by the traced lines."
*   **00:19.800 - 00:25.500:** Followed by "色づけていく ここから" which means "Begins to color from here."
*   **00:25.500 - 00:33.000:** There is an Instrumental section.

    From this moment, I'll continue marking down each line to translate, verify timestamps, and make sure that the subtitles are as precise as possible, from 00:33.000 until the end of the video.

    *   **00:33.000 - 00:38.000:** "物心がつく頃 すでにここにあった" - "By the time I was old enough to understand, it was already here"
    *   **00:38.000 - 00:41.000:** "僕じゃない誰かの記憶は" - "The memories of someone who isn't me..."
    *   **00:41.000 - 00:44.200:** "夕日と共に蘇る" - "...return along with the setting sun"
    *   **00:44.200 - 00:49.000:** "古ぼけた絵本を取り出して" - "Taking out a worn-out picture book"
    *   **00:49.000 - 00:54.000:** "落書きの中に一つの答えを見つけた" - "I found a single answer within the scribbles"
    *   **00:54.000 - 00:57.200:** "自分の価値に目を疑って" - "Doubting my own worth"
    *   **00:57.200 - 01:00.000:** "どこまでだって落ちていけるの" - "How far down can I possibly fall?"
    *   **01:00.000 - 01:02.500:** "どこか遠くに消えてしまいたい" - "I want to disappear somewhere far away"
    *   **01:02.500 - 01:05.400:** "こんな世界じゃ僕は要らない" - "In a world like this, I am not needed"
    *   **01:05.400 - 


**Debugging Timecode Overlap**

Okay, here we go. The error message is screaming at me: "Start time (01:00.000) must be strictly before end time (01:00.000)". Right, that's a clear indication of a problem. Let's dig in. I see `"e": "01:00.000", "s": "01:00.000"` for the line with "どこまでだって落ちていけるの". Wait a second! I remember that entry. Let's go back to that array block. Aha! I remember now. I see the problem: I typed `"s": "01:00.000"` instead of `"s": "00:57.200"`. It should have been s: 00:57.200, e: 01:00.000. Easy fix.

Okay, now let's make sure I didn't introduce any new errors while fixing this. Time for a full verification pass. Let's make sure that all the timestamps are correct. No overlaps or start-equals-end errors allowed.

I'll check the entries in the array line by line. Line 10: I see `{e: "00:57.200", en: "Doubting my own worth,", og: "自分の価値に目を疑って", s: "00:54.000"}` -> Correct. Line 11: I see the problem.  `{e: "01:00.000", en: "how far down can I possibly fall?", og: "どこまでだって落ちていけるの", s: "00:57.200"}`. Now it's good, all correct. Line 12:  `{e: "01:02.500", en: "I want to disappear somewhere far away.", og: "どこか遠くに消えてしまいたい", s: "01:00.000"}` -> That looks correct as well.

Now, let's re-verify the full structure: Line 1: 00:02.500 -> 00:07.500; Line 2: 00:11.600 -> 00:14.300; ... I'll go through the array entries quickly, double-checking the start and end times for each line, making sure there are no overlaps. After a quick scan, everything looks perfect now.  Clean data is ready to go!
